## Views

| view_name | view_definition |
| --- | --- |
| public.v_print_log_daily |  SELECT source_date,<br>    printer_name,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_printed) AS done_jobs,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_aborted) AS aborted_jobs,<br>    count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_deleted) AS deleted_jobs,<br>    COALESCE(sum(printed_area), (0)::bigint) AS printed_area_m2,<br>    COALESCE(sum(media_length_used), (0)::bigint) AS media_length_m,<br>    COALESCE(sum(duration_sec), (0)::bigint) AS duration_sec<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows<br>  GROUP BY source_date, printer_name; |
| public.v_print_log_rows |  SELECT id,<br>    printer_name,<br>    source_date,<br>    row_type,<br>    job_id,<br>    job_name,<br>    result,<br>    is_printed,<br>    is_deleted,<br>    is_aborted,<br>    reception_at,<br>    start_at,<br>    ready_at,<br>        CASE<br>            WHEN ((start_at IS NOT NULL) AND (ready_at IS NOT NULL) AND (ready_at >= start_at) AND (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (ready_at - start_at)) <= (86400)::numeric)) THEN (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (ready_at - start_at)))::integer<br>            ELSE NULL::integer<br>        END AS duration_sec,<br>    media_type,<br>    media_length_used,<br>    printed_area,<br>    ((media_length_used)::numeric / 10000.0) AS media_length_m,<br>    ((printed_area)::numeric / 1000000.0) AS printed_area_m2<br>   FROM print_accounting_rows; |
| public.v_print_order_pipeline |  WITH reprint_summary AS (<br>         SELECT processed_order_reprint_requests.order_id,<br>            (count(*))::integer AS reprint_request_count,<br>            (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (processed_order_reprint_requests.status = 'pending'::text)))::integer AS reprint_pending_count,<br>            (count(*) FILTER (WHERE (processed_order_reprint_requests.status = ANY (ARRAY['completed'::text, 'resolved'::text, 'done'::text]))))::integer AS reprint_completed_count,<br>            (array_agg(processed_order_reprint_requests.status ORDER BY processed_order_reprint_requests.requested_at DESC, processed_order_reprint_requests.id DESC))[1] AS latest_reprint_status<br>           FROM processed_order_reprint_requests<br>          GROUP BY processed_order_reprint_requests.order_id<br>        ), incoming_pipeline AS (<br>         SELECT i.order_number,<br>            i.external_order_id,<br>            i.customer_order_id,<br>            i.received_at,<br>            i.api_seen_at,<br>            p.id AS processed_order_id,<br>            p.order_name AS processed_order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.queued_date_time AS processed_at,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_month<br>           FROM (print_orders_received i<br>             LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT p_1.id,<br>                    p_1.order_key,<br>                    p_1.order_name,<br>                    p_1.xml_file_name,<br>                    p_1.guid,<br>                    p_1.status,<br>                    p_1.order_date_time,<br>                    p_1.queued_date_time,<br>                    p_1.printer_name,<br>                    p_1.run_workflow,<br>                    p_1.workflow_name,<br>                    p_1.order_type,<br>                    p_1.print_files,<br>                    p_1.source_xml_path,<br>                    p_1.source_xml_hash,<br>                    p_1.source_month,<br>                    p_1.imported_at,<br>                    p_1.updated_at,<br>                    p_1.order_dedupe_key,<br>                    p_1.ignored,<br>                    p_1.ignore_reason<br>                   FROM processed_print_orders p_1<br>                  WHERE ((COALESCE(p_1.ignored, false) = false) AND (p_1.order_name = ANY (array_remove(ARRAY[i.order_number, i.external_order_id, i.customer_order_id], NULL::text))))<br>                  ORDER BY<br>                        CASE<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.order_number) THEN 1<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.external_order_id) THEN 2<br>                            WHEN (p_1.order_name = i.customer_order_id) THEN 3<br>                            ELSE 4<br>                        END, p_1.queued_date_time DESC NULLS LAST, p_1.id DESC<br>                 LIMIT 1) p ON (true))<br>        ), processed_orphans AS (<br>         SELECT p.order_name AS order_number,<br>            NULL::text AS external_order_id,<br>            NULL::text AS customer_order_id,<br>            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS received_at,<br>            NULL::timestamp with time zone AS api_seen_at,<br>            p.id AS processed_order_id,<br>            p.order_name AS processed_order_name,<br>            p.xml_file_name,<br>            p.queued_date_time AS processed_at,<br>            p.queued_date_time,<br>            p.workflow_name,<br>            p.order_type,<br>            p.print_files,<br>            p.source_xml_path,<br>            p.source_month<br>           FROM processed_print_orders p<br>          WHERE ((COALESCE(p.ignored, false) = false) AND (NOT (EXISTS ( SELECT 1<br>                   FROM print_orders_received i<br>                  WHERE (p.order_name = ANY (array_remove(ARRAY[i.order_number, i.external_order_id, i.customer_order_id], NULL::text)))))))<br>        ), pipeline_rows AS (<br>         SELECT incoming_pipeline.order_number,<br>            incoming_pipeline.external_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.customer_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.received_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.api_seen_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_order_id,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_order_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.xml_file_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.processed_at,<br>            incoming_pipeline.queued_date_time,<br>            incoming_pipeline.workflow_name,<br>            incoming_pipeline.order_type,<br>            incoming_pipeline.print_files,<br>            incoming_pipeline.source_xml_path,<br>            incoming_pipeline.source_month<br>           FROM incoming_pipeline<br>        UNION ALL<br>         SELECT processed_orphans.order_number,<br>            processed_orphans.external_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.customer_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.received_at,<br>            processed_orphans.api_seen_at,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_order_id,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_order_name,<br>            processed_orphans.xml_file_name,<br>            processed_orphans.processed_at,<br>            processed_orphans.queued_date_time,<br>            processed_orphans.workflow_name,<br>            processed_orphans.order_type,<br>            processed_orphans.print_files,<br>            processed_orphans.source_xml_path,<br>            processed_orphans.source_month<br>           FROM processed_orphans<br>        )<br> SELECT COALESCE(pr.order_number, pr.processed_order_name) AS order_number,<br>    pr.external_order_id,<br>    pr.customer_order_id,<br>    pr.received_at,<br>    pr.api_seen_at,<br>    pr.processed_order_id,<br>    pr.processed_order_name,<br>    pr.xml_file_name,<br>    pr.processed_at,<br>    pr.queued_date_time,<br>    pr.workflow_name,<br>    pr.order_type,<br>    pr.print_files,<br>    pr.source_xml_path,<br>    pr.source_month,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_request_count, 0) AS reprint_request_count,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) AS reprint_pending_count,<br>    COALESCE(r.reprint_completed_count, 0) AS reprint_completed_count,<br>    r.latest_reprint_status,<br>    (COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) > 0) AS reprint_pending,<br>        CASE<br>            WHEN (COALESCE(r.reprint_pending_count, 0) > 0) THEN 'reprint_pending'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NOT NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'processed'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NOT NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NULL)) THEN 'received_only'::text<br>            WHEN ((pr.external_order_id IS NULL) AND (pr.processed_order_id IS NOT NULL)) THEN 'processed_without_received'::text<br>            ELSE 'received_only'::text<br>        END AS pipeline_status<br>   FROM (pipeline_rows pr<br>     LEFT JOIN reprint_summary r ON ((r.order_id = pr.processed_order_id))); |
